scope: DinoBrain desired OS audit using verified RAG knowledge, local code, local data, live verification, and 20 subagent reviews.

p0.title: Hook wrapper must fail closed at the outermost layer
p0.acceptance: Wrapper failures block and live fresh Codex/Claude prompts produce preflight events before useful work.

p0.title: Provenance/source mapping must resolve real source lineage
p0.acceptance: Accepted claims resolve to source chunks/provenance/source URI/verification status or are labeled unsupported/internal.

p0.title: Review/read-only mode must be genuinely read-only
p0.acceptance: Read-only audit can finish without accepted-memory promotion, compounding, or data push.

p0.title: Installer/update must never reset protected local data
p0.acceptance: Existing dirty/ahead data repo causes safe failure, not reset.

p1: Retrieval quality is not yet real hybrid RAG.
Behavior eval does not yet evaluate behavior.
SQLite fast path and cold storage are not durable enough.
Public auto-push policy is too permissive.
Observatory must prove the active read loop, not just render a graph.
ordered_plan: Safety first: wrapper fail-closed, review/read-only mode, protected installer update, public auto-push defaults.
Truth layer: lineage resolver, graph-health real-vault check, source/chunk/claim edges.
Retrieval layer: durable SQLite refresh, FTS/prefix candidate generation, real dense embeddings, query intent budgets.
Evaluation layer: real context canaries and paired behavior eval.
Growth layer: auto-compounding to candidate/hold first, lifecycle backpressure, hot/warm/cold memory temperature.
Observatory layer: task-correlated read trace and state phases.
Recovery layer: release parity, install/restore proof, private/encrypted full backup path.
consensus_fixes: real dense hybrid retrieval and rerank evaluation
latest_pass_changes: excluded task summaries and .dino operational files from default retrieval
limited recent task injection to operation/recent-task intent
rebuilt SQLite shards through temp files and retry replacement
added Korean correction cues for session/compounding extraction
kept live Codex proof as incomplete until codex_desktop hook events exist
